meaning: n.库房,仓库,火车站,公共汽车站,航空站,军械库,补给站,新兵训练营
examples: The scene inside the Home Depot on Weyman Avenue here would give the old-time American craftsman pause.
Sol Axelrod, 37, the manager of the Home Depot here, fittingly learned to fix his own car as a teenager, even changing the brakes.
In order to boost our sales and profits, we should therefore switch from newspaper advertising to frequent radio advertisements like those for Disc Depot.
Meanwhile, Home Depot has been slow in getting its own Web store up and running.
There were 11, 500 office products dealers when Office Depot superstores started popping up in the late 1980s.
